items.prompt: This offline module’s goal is to…
choices: build and run a small UVM test with Verilator as host via the course Makefile
replace Accellera UVM with browser sketches only
teach only VIP packaging with no simulator
items.explain: Track A: UVM_HOME → make run SIM=verilator → read pass/fail.

items.prompt: Before `make run` in module 24, module 23 expects you to understand…
choices: UVM_HOME, include paths, SIM=verilator, and TEST / +UVM_TESTNAME
items.explain: Module 23 maps Makefile knobs; module 24 executes them.

items.prompt: A common first Verilator UVM target in the in-course hello is…
choices: module1 test_and_gate_uvm via make run SIM=verilator
only the platform tools index HTML
a synthesis netlist with no testbench
items.explain: Small UVM + Verilator example under module1/tests/uvm_tests.

items.prompt: Browser lab success does not replace compiling and running Accellera UVM with Verilator offline.
items.explain: Sketches are literacy; module 24 proves the toolchain.

items.prompt: The in-course examples/verilator-uvm-hello tree in this curriculum is…
choices: fidelity-only practice surface — prefer commands documented in modules 23–24
the only place UVM methodology is taught
a replacement for all browser labs in modules 00–21
unsupported and must never be opened
items.explain: Archive for Makefile/run fidelity; methodology stays in modules 00–21.
